category_sources: Official README describes Hexcurse as a curses-based hex editing utility for opening, editing, and saving files.
source_facts.description says it is an ncurses-based console hex editor.
display_name_sources: Official README heading uses "hexcurse" and About text uses "Hexcurse".
docs_sources: Official README includes description, requirements, installation, usage, and keyboard shortcuts.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/LonnyGomes/hexcurse; repo returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README mentions curses-based editing, ncurses requirements, usage flags, and keyboard shortcuts.
source_facts.description identifies an ncurses console hex editor.
